title: Premier Pain mod
description: Add villager decoration blocks in lots of materials, food, beers, biomes  and other adventure thing related to villager and the Premier Pain !
body:
![Big logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12557a520469cf82419c615af9664517b114cac.jpeg)

## What's this mod ?
This mod is everything I simply want to add to Minecraft themed around villager and the Premier Pain.

### Try villager decoration !
Villager blocks can be crafted in a lot of materials such as wood type or mineral like emerald !
![golden decoration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dbdec7f3835113d314d7d000e9a3fa6cd5bc438.png)

### Brew your own beer and share it with your friends or swim in it !
![Beer Pool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0307a047a6f1bc723322ee94e913f952688448b5.jpeg)

### Explore new biomes and structures
Forest, swamp, jungle or a giant field try those biomes!
![premier pain ruins swamp biomes with its temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11494b1f463dbf06b9fad613b059101bc155aa89.jpeg)

## Features : 
See the [Modrinth gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/premier-pain-mod/gallery) for more screenshots and check the [wiki](https://github.com/UnPainPerdu/premier-pain-mod/wiki) for detailled content !
-------------------------------
## Dependencies (These mods ARE needed) : 

- [![TerraBlender Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac0a6fc200ec0db6c737328a64224f7b3d10c78.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)
- [![SBL Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e826d74a2642f580776f9f6ad9f0667f6b126f12.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smartbrainlib)
## Integration (These mods ARE NOT needed): 
- [![Just Enough Item logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f8a6c527c003ae006ee11fb470f83d6d846aa4b_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
## Modpack Use :
You can use it without asking, just don't pretent it's yours
## Notes :
- I lost motivation to mantain/update this mod. Do not espect any update for now.
- Please do not repost my mod without my authorization.
